hits.title: Advancements in long-read genome sequencing technologies and algorithms.
Single-cell long-read targeted sequencing reveals transcriptional variation in ovarian cancer.
High resolution long-read telomere sequencing reveals dynamic mechanisms in aging and cancer.
Long-read sequencing of an advanced cancer cohort resolves rearrangements, unravels haplotypes, and reveals methylation landscapes.

text:
Several recent papers from 2024 discuss advancements in long-read sequencing technologies, including their applications in cancer research, telomere sequencing, and single-cell analysis.

### Recent Long-Read Sequencing Research (2024)

Recent literature highlights diverse applications and technological progress in long-read sequencing:

* **Technological Advancements:** Research has focused on developments in long-read genome sequencing technologies and associated algorithms [PMID:38608738], as well as broader emerging sequencing technologies [PMID:38692283].
* **Cancer Research:** Long-read sequencing is being utilized to resolve rearrangements, unravel haplotypes, and reveal methylation landscapes in advanced cancer cohorts [PMID:39406235]. Additionally, single-cell long-read targeted sequencing has been used to reveal transcriptional variation in ovarian cancer [PMID:39134520].
* **Telomere Analysis:** High-resolution long-read telomere sequencing has been applied to investigate dynamic mechanisms in both aging and cancer [PMID:38890299].
